_help.brand_name: Customer brand name shown in reports (e.g., 'Acme Skincare').
_help.brand_slug: Set automatically by init_brand.py from the slug arg. Used as the folder name and in report filenames.
_help.niche: Short category descriptor (e.g., 'natural skincare', 'fitness apparel', 'meal kits').
_help.what_you_sell_and_to_whom: One-line description of product + target audience (e.g., 'anti-aging serums to women aged 35-55 who want clean ingredients').
_help.product_name: Exact product name to feature in generated ads (e.g., 'Acme Renewal Serum').
_help.product_type: Form factor / packaging description (e.g., '30ml glass dropper bottle with white label').
_help.language: Language used for text overlays in generated ads (default: 'English').
_help.product_image_filename: Filename of the high-quality product image you'll drop in this brand folder. The skill will attach this image alongside the prompt when you generate creatives. Leave blank if you don't have one yet.
